footer.text: Made with paws, use at own risk

validation_errors.required: The void rejects emptiness — fill this field.
validation_errors.max_length: Too long for the parish scroll (max {{ maxLength }} characters). Shorten it.
validation_errors.min_length: Your secret mantra is too short for initiation (at least {{ minLength }} characters).
validation_errors.email_pattern: This sigil doesn't look like email. Check the address.
validation_errors.password_pattern: Temple cipher: at least 8 characters — one uppercase, one lowercase, one digit. Latin letters and digits only, no spaces.
